Package com.apexfintechsolutions.ascendsdk.models.components

Class InvestigationUpdate

java.lang.Object
com.apexfintechsolutions.ascendsdk.models.components.InvestigationUpdate
public class InvestigationUpdate extends Object
InvestigationUpdate

Contains investigation details of corresponding investigation

  • Constructor Details

    • InvestigationUpdate

      public InvestigationUpdate(Optional<String> clientId, Optional<String> comment, Optional<? extends InvestigationUpdateIdentityVerification> identityVerification, Optional<? extends InvestigationUpdateInvestigationRequestState> investigationRequestState, Optional<? extends List<WatchlistMatchUpdate>> watchlistMatches)

    • InvestigationUpdate

      public InvestigationUpdate()

  • Method Details

    • clientId

      public Optional<String> clientId()
      A unique identifier referencing a client The client ID serves as the unique identifier for the apex client positioned above the correspondent within the apex client configurator hierarchy. Moving forward, the account service will internally assign the client ID for all investigations.

    • comment

      public Optional<String> comment()
      Comment relating to why the investigation state was updated

    • identityVerification

      public Optional<InvestigationUpdateIdentityVerification> identityVerification()
      The screen state of one screening within an investigation, one of: - `SCREEN_STATE_UNSPECIFIED` - Default/Null value. - `PENDING` - Screen result is pending. - `PASSED` - Screen result has passed. - `FAILED` - Screen result has failed. - `NEEDS_REVIEW` - Screen result needs manual review. - `DEFERRED_REVIEW` - Screen result is deferred for review at a later date. - `OUT_OF_SCOPE` - Screen state is out of scope for this investigation type.

    • investigationRequestState

      public Optional<InvestigationUpdateInvestigationRequestState> investigationRequestState()
      The state of an investigation request, one of: - `INVESTIGATION_REQUEST_STATE_UNSPECIFIED` - Default/Null value. - `OPEN` - The investigation request is open. - `CLOSED` - The investigation request is closed.

    • watchlistMatches

      public Optional<List<WatchlistMatchUpdate>> watchlistMatches()
      A list of watchlist entries matched against the investigation

    • builder

      public static InvestigationUpdate.Builder builder()

    • withClientId

      public InvestigationUpdate withClientId(String clientId)
      A unique identifier referencing a client The client ID serves as the unique identifier for the apex client positioned above the correspondent within the apex client configurator hierarchy. Moving forward, the account service will internally assign the client ID for all investigations.

    • withClientId

      public InvestigationUpdate withClientId(Optional<String> clientId)
      A unique identifier referencing a client The client ID serves as the unique identifier for the apex client positioned above the correspondent within the apex client configurator hierarchy. Moving forward, the account service will internally assign the client ID for all investigations.

    • withComment

      public InvestigationUpdate withComment(String comment)
      Comment relating to why the investigation state was updated

    • withComment

      public InvestigationUpdate withComment(Optional<String> comment)
      Comment relating to why the investigation state was updated

    • withIdentityVerification

      public InvestigationUpdate withIdentityVerification(InvestigationUpdateIdentityVerification identityVerification)
      The screen state of one screening within an investigation, one of: - `SCREEN_STATE_UNSPECIFIED` - Default/Null value. - `PENDING` - Screen result is pending. - `PASSED` - Screen result has passed. - `FAILED` - Screen result has failed. - `NEEDS_REVIEW` - Screen result needs manual review. - `DEFERRED_REVIEW` - Screen result is deferred for review at a later date. - `OUT_OF_SCOPE` - Screen state is out of scope for this investigation type.

    • withIdentityVerification

      public InvestigationUpdate withIdentityVerification(Optional<? extends InvestigationUpdateIdentityVerification> identityVerification)
      The screen state of one screening within an investigation, one of: - `SCREEN_STATE_UNSPECIFIED` - Default/Null value. - `PENDING` - Screen result is pending. - `PASSED` - Screen result has passed. - `FAILED` - Screen result has failed. - `NEEDS_REVIEW` - Screen result needs manual review. - `DEFERRED_REVIEW` - Screen result is deferred for review at a later date. - `OUT_OF_SCOPE` - Screen state is out of scope for this investigation type.

    • withInvestigationRequestState

      public InvestigationUpdate withInvestigationRequestState(InvestigationUpdateInvestigationRequestState investigationRequestState)
      The state of an investigation request, one of: - `INVESTIGATION_REQUEST_STATE_UNSPECIFIED` - Default/Null value. - `OPEN` - The investigation request is open. - `CLOSED` - The investigation request is closed.

    • withInvestigationRequestState

      public InvestigationUpdate withInvestigationRequestState(Optional<? extends InvestigationUpdateInvestigationRequestState> investigationRequestState)
      The state of an investigation request, one of: - `INVESTIGATION_REQUEST_STATE_UNSPECIFIED` - Default/Null value. - `OPEN` - The investigation request is open. - `CLOSED` - The investigation request is closed.

      A list of watchlist entries matched against the investigation
